song.title: Therefore, With Joy
song.author: Isaiah 12:3-4, 6
song.lyrics:
[V1] .A 1) Therefore, with joy shall ye draw water . A7 C#7 D Out of the wells of salvation . A F#m And in that day, shall ye say . B7 E7 Praise the Lord
[P] . A Therefore, with joy shall ye draw water . A7 C#7 D Out of the wells of salvation .A E7 And in that day, shall ye say . A D A A7 Praise the Lord
[C] .D Chorus Call upon His name . A Declare His doings among the people . B7 E7 Make mention that His name is exalted . A Cry out and shout . A7 D Thou inhabitant of Zion . E7 A For great is the Holy One of Israel in the midst of Thee
